scripts.build:remote-worker: cargo zigbuild --manifest-path packages/remote-worker-rs/Cargo.toml --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl --release && mkdir -p packages/remote-worker/dist && cp packages/remote-worker-rs/target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/remote-worker-rs packages/remote-worker/dist/remote-worker-linux-x64
scripts.tauri:dev: yarn build:remote-worker && concurrently --kill-others "yarn workspace @git-yak/server dev" "yarn workspace @git-yak/client tauri:dev"
